steps.expected: Page loads with stat cards, DataTable, and Create ticket button
Stat cards for Total, Open, In Progress, Resolved visible
steps.observed: Total: 3, Open: 3, In Progress: 0, Resolved: 0 — all visible

steps.expected: DataTable with ticket rows showing subject, category, status, priority, created date
steps.observed: 3 ticket rows rendered with all columns
Dialog opened with Subject, Category, Priority, Description fields

steps.action: Fill Subject with 'VAL-SUPPORT-002 E2E Test Ticket'

steps.observed: Category dropdown changed to Bug Report

steps.action: Fill Description with test content (>10 chars)

steps.expected: POST /portal/support/tickets returns 200/201, toast shown, dialog closes, new ticket in list
steps.observed: POST fired, dialog closed, stat cards updated (Total: 4, Open: 4), new ticket 'VAL-SUPPORT-002 E2E Test Ticket' appeared as first row

steps.action: Click on ticket row (Bug Report cell of first ticket)
steps.observed: Dialog opened with title 'VAL-SUPPORT-002 E2E Test Ticket'

steps.expected: Shows subject, publicId, status badge, category, description, dates
steps.observed: Subject: 'VAL-SUPPORT-002 E2E Test Ticket', publicId: '#ded3e4d1-a4bc-4cd3-91f9-e31df2fb6ad8', Status badge: 'Open', Category: 'Bug Report', Description present, Created: 'Today, 12:45 pm', Updated: 'Today, 12:45 pm', Company: MOCK, Requester: validation.admin@example.com
Drawer closed, returned to ticket list view

evidence.network: N/A (drawer uses existing data, no additional API call)

steps.expected: Validation errors for subject and description, no POST fired
steps.observed: 'Subject is required' and 'Description is required' error messages appeared, no POST request fired

steps.action: Fill subject with 'ab' (2 chars, min 3) and description with 'short' (5 chars, min 10)
steps.expected: Min-length validation errors shown, no POST fired
steps.observed: 'Subject must be at least 3 characters' and 'Description must be at least 10 characters' errors appeared, no POST request fired

evidence.network: No POST requests fired during validation testing

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Support Tickets page loads correctly with stat cards and DataTable. Create ticket flow works E2E with POST returning success. Ticket detail drawer shows all required fields (subject, publicId, status badge, category, description, dates) and close button works. Form validation correctly blocks submission on empty fields and short inputs with appropriate error messages.
